run_config.json.purpose: Frozen run configuration, method, data paths, budget, acceptance criteria, and rerun command.

status.json.purpose: Current phase, health, progress counters, ETA, throughput, current best metric, and last error.

progress.csv.purpose: Longitudinal training progress, completed/total units, percent, ETA, throughput, evaluation, loss, feasibility, and benchmark metrics.

checkpoints/.purpose: Policy, value, Q, world-model, optimizer, and normalization states needed for restart and evaluation. Must include the selected best checkpoint and may include the last checkpoint for diagnostics.
checkpoints/.update_frequency: checkpoint interval, best-policy updates, and final last-checkpoint save

checkpoints/best_*.purpose: Best model selected by held-out evaluation metric; final evaluation should load this by default.

evaluation/.purpose: Per-seed and aggregate evaluation results against baselines and bounds.

results/fallback_selection.json.purpose: Training-instability fallback record: declared fallback method, trigger, fallback metric, primary metric, activation status, and selected handoff method.
results/fallback_selection.json.update_frequency: pilot and final evaluation when training methods are used
